title: Orders API
description: The Orders API enables merchants to create and manage orders. Orders must be created to initiate payments because each payment is assigned to a specific order. In this way, each payment is coupled with the total payable amount and detailed line items like products purchased, the quantity of products, the individual price per item etc. This streamlines the payment operations (tracking, receipts, refunds etc.).

apis.heading: Create Order
apis.description: The createOrder API lets you create and pay for an order in a single call—supporting purchases, returns, and multiple payment methods for faster checkout.

reqParams.name: terminal$id
reqParams.description: ID of the checkout or payment terminal

reqParams.name: referenceId
reqParams.description: External reference ID for the order

reqParams.name: comments
reqParams.description: Additional comments or notes for the order

reqParams.name: code
reqParams.description: International dialing code (Eg., 46 for Sweden without '+')

reqParams.name: birthDate
reqParams.description: Date of birth in YYYY-MM-DD format

reqParams.name: countryResidence
reqParams.description: Country of residence of the customer

reqParams.name: gdNumber
reqParams.description: Government-issued identification number of the customer

reqParams.name: poDetails
reqParams.description: Purchase order details for the company

reqParams.name: name
reqParams.description: Full name of the billing contact

reqParams.name: firstName
reqParams.description: First name of the billing contact

reqParams.name: middleName
reqParams.description: Middle name of the billing contact

reqParams.name: lastName
reqParams.description: Last name of the billing contact

reqParams.name: code
reqParams.description: International dialing code (Eg., 46 for Sweden without '+')

reqParams.name: name
reqParams.description: Full name of the shipping contact

reqParams.name: firstName
reqParams.description: First name of the shipping contact

reqParams.name: middleName
reqParams.description: Middle name of the shipping contact

reqParams.name: lastName
reqParams.description: Last name of the shipping contact

reqParams.name: code
reqParams.description: International dialing code (Eg., 46 for Sweden without '+')

reqParams.name: orderLines
reqParams.description: List of items in the order

reqParams.name: quantity
reqParams.description: Quantity ordered. A negative value indicates a refund.

reqParams.name: amount
reqParams.description: Pricing details for the line item

reqParams.name: regular
reqParams.description: Regular price amount in the smallest currency unit (eg.,10 SEK is 1000 in amount)

reqParams.name: campaign
reqParams.description: Campaign/discount amount in the smallest currency unit (eg.,10 SEK is 1000 in amount)

reqParams.name: shipping
reqParams.description: Shipping amount for this item in the smallest currency unit (eg.,10 SEK is 1000 in amount)

reqParams.name: total
reqParams.description: Total line amount in the smallest currency unit (eg.,10 SEK is 1000 in amount)

reqParams.name: unit
reqParams.description: Unit of measure. The possible values are 'm' , 'mm' , 'cm' , 'km' , 'in' , 'ft' , 'mi' , 'kg' , 'g' , 'mg' , 'lb' , 'oz' , 'l' , 'ml' , 'cu. m' , 'gal' , 'pt' , 'fl oz' , 'W' , 'kW' , 'kWh' , 'sq m' , 'sq km' , 'sq ft' , 'h' , 'min' , 's' , 'days' , 'wk' , 'mn' , 'yr' , 'nos'.

reqParams.name: purchaseOrderId
reqParams.description: Mandatory purchase order identifier if its a return item.

reqParams.name: purchasePaymentId
reqParams.description: Purchase payment identifier associated with the order line

reqParams.name: totalOrderAmount
reqParams.description: Total amount details of the order.

reqParams.name: regular
reqParams.description: Total regular order amount in the smallest currency unit (e.g., 10 SEK is represented as 1000)

reqParams.name: campaign
reqParams.description: Total campaign or discount amount applied to the order in the smallest currency unit

reqParams.name: total
reqParams.description: Overall payable order amount in the smallest currency unit (regular - campaign + shipping + tax)

reqParams.name: currency
reqParams.description: Order currency represented as a numeric ISO 4217 code (e.g., '752' for SEK)

reqParams.name: tax
reqParams.description: Order-level tax breakdown across applied tax categories

reqParams.name: amount
reqParams.description: Total tax amount for the order in the smallest currency unit

reqParams.name: type
reqParams.description: Type of tax applied (e.g., VAT, GST)

reqParams.name: date
reqParams.description: Order date in ISO 8601 format (e.g., 2018-04-04T10:20:30+02:00). If not specified, the current date is used.

reqParams.name: cancelPreviousPendingOrder
reqParams.description: Set as true when you want to cancel all previous pending orders

reqParams.name: orderLineLevelCalculation
reqParams.description: Set this to true to apply campaign and shipping at row level. The total will be calculated as total = ((regular * quantity) - campaign) + shipping. Default is set to false.

reqParams.name: serviceProviders
reqParams.description: External service providers participating in the transaction

reqParams.name: adjustmentTypes
reqParams.description: Allowed adjustment types for this provider as an array of string.

reqParams.name: amount
reqParams.description: Amount to charge in smallest currency units.

reqParams.name: bic
reqParams.description: The BIC (Bank Identifier Code) is an ISO 9362 standard that uniquely identifies a bank in cross-border transactions. It is mandatory for the ACC2ACC payment method.

reqParams.name: payeePhoneNumber
reqParams.description: Mandatory phone number for SWISH payments.

reqParams.name: code
reqParams.description: International dialing code (Eg., 46 for Sweden without '+')

reqParams.name: serialSplitPaymentsMode
reqParams.description: An array of amounts in smallest currency unit to split the payment. The order of the amounts in the array will determine the order of the split payments.

reqParams.name: includeAdjustmentsForRefund
reqParams.description: Applies for return orders on whether to include the adjustments as part of the refund or not. The default value is true. For partial returns, by default the first order will have includeAdjustments set to true and for the rest as false.

reqParams.name: lockToPaymentMethods
reqParams.description: An array of payment methods locked in. All available payment methods are supported. For example, ['CARD', 'KLARNA']

reqParams.name: tapBeforeAmount
reqParams.description: If true, requires the customer to tap the card before the amount is entered, ensuring amount confirmation prior to payment.

reqParams.name: delayCapture
reqParams.description: Allows capture at a later time.

reqParams.name: delayPayout
reqParams.description: Delays the final amount paid out to the merchant after all deductions, in the format numbers + 'm' | 'h' | 'd' .

reqParams.name: fulfillmentDate
reqParams.description: Planned fulfillment date in ISO 8601 format (e.g., 2018-04-04T10:20:30+02:00)

reqParams.name: callBackUrl
reqParams.description: This is a dynamic callback URL that is used to perform webhook calls in relation to the order and payment.

reqParams.name: throwErrorIfTerminalInactiveFor
reqParams.description: Threshold in ms if the respective terminal has been inactive for the given time frame.

reqParams.name: clearingCutOff
reqParams.description: Clearing cutoff configuration in ISO 8601 format (e.g., 2018-04-04T10:20:30+02:00)

reqParams.name: authMode
reqParams.description: It can be either PRE-AUTH or AUTH. By default it is set to AUTH. If PRE-AUTH is selected delayCapture is automatically set to true.

reqParams.name: surcharges
reqParams.description: A record of additional fees or charges applied to the transaction, keyed by unique identifiers.

reqParams.description: Surcharges for consumer cards in domestic transactions.

reqParams.name: readTags
reqParams.description: This field denotes the type of NFC reading allowed on the terminal for the order. The possible values are,

possibleValues.description: This value indicates that no tags are allowed for reading.
Single read allowed for the order.
Multiple tags can be read and edited.
Multiple tags can be read, but cannot be modified.

reqParams.name: enforceTokenization
reqParams.description: Denotes whether the card is tokenised for a future transaction or not.

reqParams.name: paymentPageValidFor
reqParams.description: Default validity of the payment page in format <number><unit>, where unit is 'm' | 'h' | 'd' (e.g., '15m', '2h', '3d').

reqParams.name: redirectUrl
reqParams.description: Redirect URL after the online transaction completes successfully. The orderId will be appended as a query parameter.

reqParams.name: accountNameVerification
reqParams.description: Account-name verification strategy used during payment (implementation-specific enum).

reqParams.name: errorIfTokenizationFails
reqParams.description: If true, fail the flow when card tokenization cannot be completed.

reqParams.name: failureRedirectUrl
reqParams.description: Redirect URL when the transaction fails. The orderId will be appended as a query parameter.

reqParams.name: tokenisationIfPossible
reqParams.description: Attempts tokenization when supported, without failing the flow if tokenization is unavailable.

reqParams.name: subscription
reqParams.description: Marks this as a subscription/recurring-capable order.

reqParams.name: payButtonType
reqParams.description: UI pay button label/type used on the payment page.

reqParams.name: generateShortLink
reqParams.description: If true, generates a short URL for the payment page. Default is false.

reqParams.name: generateOnlineLinkWith
reqParams.description: The terminal identifier used to generate the online payment link.

reqParams.name: recurring
reqParams.description: Encompasses all controls related to recurring payments.

reqParams.name: subscriptionAmountType
reqParams.description: Determines the type of the subscription amount for order.

reqParams.name: maxAmount
reqParams.description: Maximum amount for the order in the lowest currency unit (only valid for variable subscription amounts).

reqParams.name: numberOfPayments
reqParams.description: Total number of payments expected for this order.

reqParams.name: uniqueReference
reqParams.description: A unique reference for the recurring order.

reqParams.name: validation
reqParams.description: The validation type for the recurring order, possible values are 'validated' | 'notValidated'.

reqParams.name: currency
reqParams.description: Currency as a numeric ISO 4217 code (string), e.g., '752' for SEK.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the request, indicated as either 'SUCCESS' or 'ERROR'.

resParams.name: data
resParams.description: Response data.

resParams.name: orderId
resParams.description: Order ID of the order created.

resParams.name: paymentId
resParams.description: A payment ID assigned to each payment instance. Ensure that this ID is stored securely and tied to an identifiable entity until payment completion.

resParams.name: interAppJWT
resParams.description: This key can be used in the inter-app flow to be passed in as part of the app switch. This is an optional key that can improve inter-app transaction initiation performance. This is currently only functional for CARD payments.

resParams.name: nonce
resParams.description: The authorization key required to process online payments through a SelfHostedPage terminal.

resParams.name: paymentPageLink
resParams.description: This is the payment page link where payments can be made, applicable to both PaymentPage and iFrame terminals.

resParams.name: shortLinkUrl
resParams.description: Short link to the payment page URL when generateShortLink is set to true.

resParams.name: invoiceDetails
resParams.description: Invoice details for the payment when applicable.

resParams.name: invoiceId
resParams.description: Unique identifier for the invoice.

resParams.name: invoicePdfUrl
resParams.description: URL to download the invoice PDF.

resParams.name: iban
resParams.description: International Bank Account Number for the invoice.

resParams.name: accountHolderName
resParams.description: Name of the account holder for the invoice.

resParams.name: bic
resParams.description: Bank Identifier Code for the invoice.

resParams.name: paymentUrl
resParams.description: Direct URL for payment processing.

resParams.name: qr
resParams.description: QR code data for payment.

resParams.name: qrData
resParams.description: Raw QR code data for payment processing.

resParams.name: qrVisibleFor
resParams.description: Duration for which the QR code remains visible.

resParams.name: qrLink
resParams.description: Link to the QR code for payment.

resParams.name: klarnaClientToken
resParams.description: Client token for Klarna payment processing.

resParams.name: paymentToken
resParams.description: Token for payment processing.

resParams.name: sveaInitiationParams
resParams.description: Initiation parameters for Svea payment processing.

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message that describes the status of the request.

apis.heading: Update Order
apis.description: Updates the details of an existing order. This API allows you to modify order information while retaining the same Order ID as the original order. Once a payment has been initiated for the order, further updates are no longer permitted.

apis.heading: Fetch Order Status
apis.description: Retrieves the status of the given order. Use this API to obtain information about the current status of the order including the respective payment and transaction details.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the request, indicated as either 'SUCCESS' or 'ERROR'.

resParams.name: data
resParams.description: Response data.

resParams.name: orderStatus
resParams.description: Describes the status of the order. The possible values are:

possibleValues.description: An order has been created and is waiting for payment processing.
The payment has been completed for the order.
The payment attempt has been cancelled for the order.
A partial payment was completed for the order

resParams.name: payments
resParams.description: Retrieves the status of all payments related to the order.

resParams.name: paymentId
resParams.description: Unique identifier of the payment

resParams.name: paymentStatus
resParams.description: Describes the status of the payment. The possible values are:

possibleValues.description: A payment attempt has been initiated.
The payment attempt has been cancelled.

resParams.name: failureReason
resParams.description: Indicates the reason of the payment failure if it is available. You can refer to Concepts → Payments for a complete list of payment failure reasons.

resParams.name: paymentMethod
resParams.description: Denotes the payment method used.

resParams.name: amount
resParams.description: Amount involved with the payment attempt.

resParams.name: paymentIds
resParams.description: An array of successful Payment Id(s) related to an order. Payment Ids are available once order reaches 'PAYMENT_COMPLETED' or 'PARTIAL_PAYMENT_COMPLETED' state.

resParams.name: transactions
resParams.description: Retrieves all transaction details for the order. This information is only available when orderStatus is 'PAYMENT_COMPLETED' or 'PARTIAL_PAYMENT_COMPLETED'

resParams.name: transactionId
resParams.description: Transaction ID of the transaction.

resParams.name: merchantId
resParams.description: Merchant ID of the merchant who performed the transaction.

resParams.name: storeId
resParams.description: Store ID of the store in which the transaction was performed

resParams.name: terminalId
resParams.description: Terminal ID of the checkout or payment terminal from which the transaction was performed.

resParams.name: orderId
resParams.description: Order ID of the order for which the transaction was performed.

resParams.name: paymentId
resParams.description: Payment ID of the transaction.

resParams.name: referenceId
resParams.description: Reference ID of the transaction.

resParams.name: rrn
resParams.description: Displays the Retrieval Reference Number(RRN) of the transaction. RRN is a key to uniquely identify a card transaction based on the ISO 8583 standard.

resParams.name: amount
resParams.description: Amount involved in the transaction, either received or refunded by the merchant, in the minor unit of the currency. For example, 10 SEK is 1000 in amount.

resParams.name: currency
resParams.description: Three digit numeric code representing the currency of the transaction.

resParams.name: method
resParams.description: The method in which the transaction was carried out. Payment method supported currently is 'CARD’.

resParams.name: type
resParams.description: Type of the transaction. It can be either 'purchase' or 'return’.

resParams.name: orderSummary
resParams.description: Specifies a short summary of the order. Usually contains the initial line items included in the order.

resParams.name: timestamp
resParams.description: Timestamp of the transaction in ISO 8601 format represented as 'YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss.sssZ'.

resParams.name: voided
resParams.description: A boolean value that denotes if the transaction has been voided or not.

resParams.name: issuerCountry
resParams.description: Country of the card issuer.

resParams.name: interchangeDomain
resParams.description: Interchange domain of the transaction. It can be Domestic | Intraregional-EEA | Interregional-Non-EEA.

resParams.name: cardCategory
resParams.description: Denotes the card category, which can be Consumer | Commercial.

resParams.name: cardUsage
resParams.description: Denotes the card type, whether it is Debit, Credit or Prepaid.

resParams.name: fee
resParams.description: The fee collected for each transaction. Fee associated with your settlements are determined by the billing plan you have chosen. These costs may include transaction fees, processing charges, and any additional fees specified in your subscription plan.

resParams.name: settlementStatus
resParams.description: Denotes the status of the settlement.

possibleValues.description: Settlement processed. Waiting on amount to be credited to merchant's bank account.
Error occurred during the settlement process.

resParams.name: payout
resParams.description: Payout is the final amount Surfboard credits to the merchant's bank account. This represents the merchant's actual earnings, which are then transferred to their bank account.

resParams.name: settlementRef
resParams.description: Reference Id for the payout which includes this transaction.

resParams.name: settlementDate
resParams.description: Date of the settlement for the transaction. Date in ISO string format.

resParams.name: truncatedPan
resParams.description: The last four digits of the PAN (Primary Account Number) from the card used for the transaction.

resParams.name: cardLabel
resParams.description: The designated label of the card brand for the transaction, often referred to as the AID (Application Identifier) Label.

resParams.name: posEntryMode
resParams.description: Indicates the mode of entry for the card during the transaction, which is based on EMV specifications. This determines whether the card was used in a contact or contactless manner.

resParams.name: issuerApplication
resParams.description: Specifies the payment application used in the transaction. Usually present when cards with both Debit and Credit facility are used.

resParams.name: terminalVerificationResult
resParams.description: Specifies the additional results if the transaction underwent EMV terminal verification.

resParams.name: aid
resParams.description: Specifies the Application Identifier (AID) associated with the card used for the transaction.

resParams.name: customerResponseCode
resParams.description: A two-character response code of the transaction. For all approved transactions, this code is '00'.

resParams.name: cvmMethod
resParams.description: Indicates the Card Holder Verification Method (CVM) used in the transaction.

resParams.name: cvmMethodDescription
resParams.description: Specifies the cvmMethod applied for the provided CARD transaction.

resParams.name: authMode
resParams.description: Indicates the authentication mode of the payment. This can be either 'ISSUER' or 'CARD'.

resParams.name: cardBrand
resParams.description: Denotes the brand of card used for the transaction. This is an optional normalized field available only for CARD payments. Eg., VISA, MASTERCARD, AMEX.

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message that describes the status of the request.

resParams.name: regular

resParams.name: campaign
resParams.description: Total campaign or discount amount applied to the order in the smallest currency unit

resParams.name: total
resParams.description: Overall payable order amount in the smallest currency unit (regular - campaign + shipping + tax)

resParams.name: currency
resParams.description: Order currency represented as a numeric ISO 4217 code (e.g., '752' for SEK)

resParams.name: tax
resParams.description: Order-level tax breakdown across applied tax categories

resParams.name: amount
resParams.description: Total tax amount for the order in the smallest currency unit

resParams.name: percentage

resParams.name: type
resParams.description: Type of tax applied (e.g., VAT, GST)

resParams.name: date
resParams.description: Order date in ISO 8601 format (e.g., 2018-04-04T10:20:30+02:00). If not specified, the current date is used.

resParams.name: metadata
resParams.description: Arbitrary key-value style metadata items

resParams.name: adjustments
resParams.description: Order-level adjustments

resParams.name: type
resParams.description: Adjustment type

resParams.name: value
resParams.description: Adjustment value

resParams.name: metadata
resParams.description: Arbitrary key-value style metadata items.

resParams.name: cancelPreviousPendingOrder
resParams.description: Set as true when you want to cancel all previous pending orders

resParams.name: orderLineLevelCalculation
resParams.description: Set this to true to apply campaign and shipping at row level. The total will be calculated as total = ((regular * quantity) - campaign) + shipping. Default is set to false.

resParams.name: includeAdjustmentsForRefund
resParams.description: Applies for return orders on whether to include the adjustments as part of the refund or not. The default value is true. For partial returns, by default the first order will have includeAdjustments set to true and for the rest as false.

resParams.name: lockToPaymentMethods
resParams.description: An array of payment methods locked in. All available payment methods are supported. For example, ['CARD', 'KLARNA']

resParams.name: tapBeforeAmount
resParams.description: If true, requires the customer to tap the card before the amount is entered, ensuring amount confirmation prior to payment.

resParams.name: delayCapture
resParams.description: Allows capture at a later time.

resParams.name: delayPayout
resParams.description: Delays the final amount paid out to the merchant after all deductions, in the format numbers + 'm' | 'h' | 'd' .

resParams.name: fulfillmentDate
resParams.description: Planned fulfillment date in ISO 8601 format (e.g., 2018-04-04T10:20:30+02:00)

resParams.name: callBackUrl
resParams.description: This is a dynamic callback URL that is used to perform webhook calls in relation to the order and payment.

resParams.name: throwErrorIfTerminalInactiveFor

resParams.name: currency

resParams.name: authMode

resParams.name: readTags
resParams.description: This field denotes the type of NFC reading allowed on the terminal for the order. The possible values are,

possibleValues.description: This value indicates that no tags are allowed for reading.
Single read allowed for the order.
Multiple tags can be read and edited.
Multiple tags can be read, but cannot be modified.

resParams.name: online
resParams.description: Online payment/link settings

resParams.name: enforceTokenization
resParams.description: Denotes whether the card is tokenised for a future transaction or not.

resParams.name: paymentPageValidFor
resParams.description: Default validity of the payment page in format <number><unit>, where unit is 'm' | 'h' | 'd' (e.g., '15m', '2h', '3d').

resParams.name: enforce3DSecure
resParams.description: Force 3-D Secure authentication when available.

resParams.name: redirectUrl
resParams.description: Redirect URL after the online transaction completes successfully. The orderId will be appended as a query parameter.

resParams.name: accountNameVerification
resParams.description: Account-name verification strategy used during payment (implementation-specific enum).

resParams.name: errorIfTokenizationFails
resParams.description: If true, fail the flow when card tokenization cannot be completed.

resParams.name: failureRedirectUrl
resParams.description: Redirect URL when the transaction fails. The orderId will be appended as a query parameter.

resParams.name: tokenisationIfPossible
resParams.description: Attempts tokenization when supported, without failing the flow if tokenization is unavailable.

resParams.name: subscription
resParams.description: Marks this as a subscription/recurring-capable order.

resParams.name: payButtonType
resParams.description: UI pay button label/type used on the payment page.

resParams.name: generateShortLink
resParams.description: If true, generates a short URL for the payment page. Default is false.

resParams.name: generateOnlineLinkWith
resParams.description: The terminal identifier used to generate the online payment link.

resParams.name: recurring
resParams.description: Encompasses all controls related to recurring payments.

resParams.name: subscriptionAmountType
resParams.description: Determines the type of the subscription amount for order.

resParams.name: maxAmount
resParams.description: Maximum amount for the order in the lowest currency unit (only valid for variable subscription amounts).

resParams.name: frequency
resParams.description: Frequency of the recurring collection. 'daily' | 'twiceWeekly' | 'weekly' | 'tenDays' | 'fortNightly' | 'monthly' | 'everyTwoMonths' | 'trimester' | 'quarterly' | 'twiceYearly' | 'annually' | 'unscheduled'.

resParams.name: numberOfPayments
resParams.description: Total number of payments expected for this order.

resParams.name: uniqueReference
resParams.description: A unique reference for the recurring order.

resParams.name: validation
resParams.description: The validation type for the recurring order, possible values are 'validated' | 'notValidated'.

resParams.name: currency
resParams.description: Currency as a numeric ISO 4217 code (string), e.g., '752' for SEK.

resParams.name: taxHandlingStrategy
resParams.description: Tax calculation strategy

resParams.name: treatAmountAsTaxExclusive
resParams.description: Prices exclude tax

resParams.name: taxTreatmentStrategy
resParams.description: Rounding strategy configuration

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message that describes the status of the request.

apis.heading: Cancel an Order
apis.description: Cancels a specific order. Use this API to cancel any created order using its Order ID. However, you cannot cancel orders that are already completed.

reqParams.name: orderId
reqParams.description: Order ID of the order to be cancelled.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the request, indicated as either 'SUCCESS' or 'ERROR'.

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message that describes the status of the request.

apis.heading: Add Receipt Information
apis.description: This API allows you to store cash register details for receipts.

reqParams.name: controlUnitSerialNumber
reqParams.description: Control unit manufacturing number or Control System manufacturing number.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the request 'SUCCESS' | 'ERROR'.

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: Status message of the request is displayed.

apis.heading: Fetch Order Adjustments
apis.description: Fetch all adjustments created under an order.
apis.query: To fetch adjustments made under a certain date range send in startDate and endDate as query params

reqParams.name: startDate
reqParams.description: Start date of the range in yyyy-mm-dd format.

reqParams.name: endDate
reqParams.description: End date of the range in yyyy-mm-dd format.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the request.

resParams.name: data
resParams.description: Response data.

resParams.name: adjustmentId
resParams.description: Adjustment ID of the adjustment.

resParams.name: adjustmentType
resParams.description: Type of the adjustment

resParams.name: amount
resParams.description: Amount of the adjustment.

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message that describes the status of the request.

apis.heading: Fetch Tokens from Order
apis.description: Fetch all tokenized card information collected for online orders.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the request.

resParams.name: data
resParams.description: Response data.

resParams.name: cardBrand
resParams.description: Denotes the brand of the card. Eg., VISA, MASTERCARD, AMEX..

resParams.name: cardholderName
resParams.description: Name of the card holder.

resParams.name: tokenId
resParams.description: Tokenized card information.

resParams.name: createdAt
resParams.description: Date of tokenization in ISO string format.

resParams.name: expiryMonth
resParams.description: Expiration month of the card.

resParams.name: expiryYear
resParams.description: Expiration year of the card.

resParams.name: truncatedPan
resParams.description: The last four digits of the PAN (Primary Account Number) from the card.

resParams.name: cardArt
resParams.description: Denotes the visual images of the card. Eg., VISA, MASTERCARD, AMEX.

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message that describes the status of the request.

apis.heading: Fetch Online Orders
apis.description: This API retrieves a list of all online orders created under a terminal.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the request.

resParams.name: data
resParams.description: Response data.

resParams.name: orderId
resParams.description: Id of the order.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the order.

resParams.name: terminalId
resParams.description: Id of the payment terminal.

resParams.name: totalOrderAmount
resParams.description: Total order value.

resParams.name: currency
resParams.description: Type of currency.

resParams.name: paymentPageUrl
resParams.description: This is the URL of the payment page.

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message that describes the status of the request.
